🔥MAZDA AXELA. SKYACTIVE🔥
Yom 2016. 1500cc. Petrol. Automatic (triptronic).
Sparkling burgundy original paint. 
Keyless entry. Push to start/stop. istop. Great stock sound system with Bluetooth and USB connectivity. Reverse camera. Steering controls. Cruise control. Winker auto side mirrors. Blind spot monitors. Clean dark interior. Llumar tint all round. Very low genuine verifiable mileage. Stock alloy 16” rims all with brand new tires. Auto Xenon Dusk sensing headlamps. Super clean car in excellent condition.
